uplink.description: EMS temperature, humidity, motion, door open and battery voltage
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic payload. Raw field values (temperature 22.6, humidity 41, motion 3, digital 1, vdd 3606 mV) confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js; expected.data is the authored normalization (vdd 3606 mV -> battery 3.606 V; digital 1 -> contactState 'open'; motion count 3 -> detected true).

uplink.description: EMS temperature, humidity, accelerometer, door closed and water leak
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic payload. Raw field values (temperature 21.5, humidity 55, x/y/z 1/39/5, digital 0, waterleak 17) confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js; expected.data is the authored normalization (digital 0 -> contactState 'closed'; waterleak 17 -> water.leak true with waterLeakLevel 17).

uplink.description: EMS negative temperature, humidity and zero motion count
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic payload exercising the signed temperature decode and a zero motion count. Raw values (temperature -10, humidity 40, motion 0) confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js; expected.data is the authored normalization (motion count 0 -> detected false).
